description: §18.0.1 / §34 — a block `<match for=Type on=expr>` written inside a `${ for (...) { lift ... } }` logic loop is parsed by the inline-markup path (not the BS-layer match-block recognizer), so its variant arms are unrecognized. impl#1 emits ONE targeted E-MATCH-BLOCK-IN-LIFT per unrecognized `<match>`, steering to `<each>`, and REPLACES the misleading E-COMPONENT-035 'unresolved component' cascade on the arm tags. Regression guard (S212 ruling / S213 impl): without the steer the `<Open>`/`<Closed>` arms surface a phantom cross-file component-import error.
rationale: §18.0.1 (block-form `<match>`) + §17.7 (`<each>`): the per-item block-`<match>` form is not supported inside a `${ ... lift ... }` logic loop; the supported per-item container is `<each in=@collection as item> ... <match for=Type on=item> ... </match> ... </each>`. impl#1 fires E-MATCH-BLOCK-IN-LIFT (§34) and suppresses the E-COMPONENT-035 cascade on the arm nodes.
